recap:
- The demo involves unpacking the Inference Table for an existing Model Serving Endpoint to understand its structure and data.
- LLM metrics will be computed to evaluate the performance and effectiveness of the model.
- Basics of Lakehouse Monitoring will be introduced, highlighting its importance in overseeing data operations.
- A more robust monitoring setup will be established using Lakehouse Monitoring to enhance performance tracking.
- The steps are sequential, building on each previous step to ensure comprehensive understanding and application.
